name: nemoclaw
description: NemoClaw user workflows — install, configure, deploy, and operate NemoClaw sandboxes for agentic AI with policy, security, inference, and monitoring controls.

interface.shortDescription: Run agentic AI safely in NemoClaw sandboxes — install, configure, deploy, and monitor.
interface.longDescription: A curated plugin bundling NemoClaw's external user skills — installing skills, configuring inference and security, deploying remotely, managing local sandboxes and network policy, monitoring sandbox activity, and looking up CLI/reference behavior. Use this plugin to onboard NemoClaw, decide how it fits an OpenClaw/OpenShell stack, and operate sandboxes day-to-day.
defaultPrompt: Install NemoClaw and launch a first sandbox.
Configure NemoClaw inference providers and security policy.
Deploy NemoClaw to a remote GPU environment.
Monitor and approve NemoClaw sandbox activity.
